'''âzh-dh-d''' ('''kazhadhad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinegun|machinegun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinegun|machinegun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-dh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kazhadhad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhadhad|thizhadhad]] || [[word:jizhadhad|jizhadhad]] || [[word:shizhadhad|shizhadhad]] || [[word:kizhadhad|kizhadhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhadhad|thuthuzhadhad]] || [[word:jujuzhadhad|jujuzhadhad]] || [[word:shushuzhadhad|shushuzhadhad]] || [[word:kukuzhadhad|kukuzhadhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhadhad|thuzhadhad]] || [[word:juzhadhad|juzhadhad]] || [[word:shuzhadhad|shuzhadhad]] || [[word:kuzhadhad|kuzhadhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhadhad|thuzhadhad]] || [[word:juzhadhad|juzhadhad]] || [[word:shuzhadhad|shuzhadhad]] || [[word:kuzhadhad|kuzhadhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhadhad|thezhadhad]] || [[word:jezhadhad|jezhadhad]] || [[word:shezhadhad|shezhadhad]] || [[word:kezhadhad|kezhadhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhadhad|thothozhadhad]] || [[word:jojozhadhad|jojozhadhad]] || [[word:shoshozhadhad|shoshozhadhad]] || [[word:kokozhadhad|kokozhadhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhadhad|thozhadhad]] || [[word:jozhadhad|jozhadhad]] || [[word:shozhadhad|shozhadhad]] || [[word:kozhadhad|kozhadhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhadhad|thozhadhad]] || [[word:jozhadhad|jozhadhad]] || [[word:shozhadhad|shozhadhad]] || [[word:kozhadhad|kozhadhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhadhad|thĂŠzhadhad]] || [[word:jĂŠzhadhad|jĂŠzhadhad]] || [[word:shĂŠzhadhad|shĂŠzhadhad]] || [[word:kĂŠzhadhad|kĂŠzhadhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhadhad|thathazhadhad]] || [[word:jajazhadhad|jajazhadhad]] || [[word:shashazhadhad|shashazhadhad]] || [[word:kakazhadhad|kakazhadhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhadhad|thazhadhad]] || [[word:jazhadhad|jazhadhad]] || [[word:shazhadhad|shazhadhad]] || [[word:kazhadhad|kazhadhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhadhad|thazhadhad]] || [[word:jazhadhad|jazhadhad]] || [[word:shazhadhad|shazhadhad]] || [[word:kazhadhad|kazhadhad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhadhad|shazhadhad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhadhad|goshazhadhad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhadhad|gokishazhadhad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhadnĂŒ|shazhadhadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnknĂŒ|goshazhadhadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadnĂŒ|gokishazhadhadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhadhadshĂ«|shazhadhadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkshĂ«|goshazhadhadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadshĂ«|gokishazhadhadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhadro|shazhadhadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkro|goshazhadhadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadro|gokishazhadhadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhadmu|shazhadhadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkmu|goshazhadhadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadmu|gokishazhadhadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhadhadsher|shazhadhadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnksher|goshazhadhadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadsher|gokishazhadhadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhadhadng|shazhadhadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkng|goshazhadhadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadng|gokishazhadhadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhadhadya|shazhadhadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkya|goshazhadhadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadya|gokishazhadhadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhadhadyam|shazhadhadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkyam|goshazhadhadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadyam|gokishazhadhadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhadnĂŒshĂ«|shazhadhadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhadhadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhadhadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhadnĂŒro|shazhadhadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnknĂŒro|goshazhadhadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadnĂŒro|gokishazhadhadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhadnĂŒmu|shazhadhadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnknĂŒmu|goshazhadhadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadnĂŒmu|gokishazhadhadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhadshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhadhadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhadhadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhadhadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhadshĂ«ro|shazhadhadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkshĂ«ro|goshazhadhadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadshĂ«ro|gokishazhadhadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhadshĂ«mu|shazhadhadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkshĂ«mu|goshazhadhadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadshĂ«mu|gokishazhadhadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhadronĂŒ|shazhadhadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkronĂŒ|goshazhadhadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadronĂŒ|gokishazhadhadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhadroshĂ«|shazhadhadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkroshĂ«|goshazhadhadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadroshĂ«|gokishazhadhadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadhadromu|shazhadhadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkromu|goshazhadhadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadromu|gokishazhadhadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadhadmunĂŒ|shazhadhadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkmunĂŒ|goshazhadhadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadmunĂŒ|gokishazhadhadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadhadmushĂ«|shazhadhadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkmushĂ«|goshazhadhadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadmushĂ«|gokishazhadhadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadhadmuro|shazhadhadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadhadnkmuro|goshazhadhadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadhadmuro|gokishazhadhadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
